title: The LA Streamer Clique just got Destroyed
description:
The year just started and it's already off to a very rough start for the LA Streamer clique which of course includes streamers such as QTCinderella, Valkyrae, Hasan, etc. A recent call out from Asmongold has sent them, and Hasan in particular, into a very strange rant as bro keeps losing it more and more. 

-----

🐦 Twitter: https://twitter.com/_Hero_Hei_

🐦 Vtuber twitter: https://twitter.com/xChaiRAWRx

Gameplay: Marvel Rivals
